moments.title: World Cup Knockout Stages Underway
moments.blurb: The FIFA World Cup 2026 is in full swing, with teams battling it out in the tense knockout stages this week, leading up to the Quarter-Finals from July 9th.

angles.name: General Excitement
angles.copy: The biggest football tournament on the planet is heating up! Who are you backing to lift the World Cup trophy? #WorldCup2026

angles.name: UK Team Focus
angles.copy: With the World Cup knockout stages firing up, the UK is gripped! What's been your favourite moment from the tournament so far?

angles.name: Quarter-Final Countdown
angles.copy: The Quarter-Finals are just days away! The tension is building as the World Cup gets serious. Which teams will make it through?

moments.title: Wimbledon Enters Second Week
moments.blurb: The Championships, Wimbledon, are well into their second week, with today seeing the Fourth Round matches and Quarter-Finals beginning on Tuesday.

angles.name: General Tennis Buzz
angles.copy: Strawberries and cream are essential as Wimbledon enters its thrilling second week! Who's serving up a storm on the grass courts? #Wimbledon

angles.name: Quarter-Finals Anticipation
angles.copy: Wimbledon Quarter-Finals are just around the corner! The competition is fierce – who do you predict will make it to the semis? #Tennis

angles.name: UK Hopefuls
angles.copy: Britain's hopes are still alive at Wimbledon! Who are you cheering on as the tournament gets to the business end?

moments.title: Tour de France Continues
moments.blurb: The 113th edition of the Tour de France is underway, having started in Barcelona yesterday, with Stage 2 taking place today.

angles.name: Cycling Excitement
angles.copy: Pedal to the metal! The Tour de France is in its early stages, bringing breathtaking scenery and intense competition. Are you following the race? #TDF2026

angles.name: Early Stages
angles.copy: The Grand Boucle is on! Stage 2 of the Tour de France is rolling today. Who's making an early impact in the peloton?

angles.name: Scenic Route
angles.copy: From Barcelona to Paris, the Tour de France is showcasing some incredible landscapes. What's your favourite stage so far?

moments.title: Duran Duran Headline BST Hyde Park
moments.blurb: Iconic 80s band Duran Duran are headlining American Express presents BST Hyde Park in London today, July 5th.

angles.name: Live Music Buzz
angles.copy: It's a huge day at BST Hyde Park as the legendary Duran Duran take to the stage! Who's there for a night of New Wave classics? #BSTHydePark

angles.name: 80s Icons Live
angles.copy: Wild Boys, Wild Night! Duran Duran are bringing their timeless hits to London's Hyde Park tonight. What's your favourite Duran Duran track?

angles.name: London Gig
angles.copy: Hyde Park is buzzing! Duran Duran are headlining BST today, making it a Sunday to remember in London. #LondonGigs

moments.title: Lewis Capaldi Two Nights at BST Hyde Park
moments.blurb: Scottish superstar Lewis Capaldi is set to play two headline shows at American Express presents BST Hyde Park next weekend, July 11th and 12th.

angles.name: Capaldi Anticipation
angles.copy: Get ready, London! Lewis Capaldi is bringing his incredible voice to BST Hyde Park for two nights next weekend. Which song are you most excited to hear live?

angles.name: Weekend Plans
angles.copy: If you're heading to BST Hyde Park next weekend, you're in for a treat with Lewis Capaldi! Expect big ballads and even bigger laughs. #LiveMusic

angles.name: Scottish Star
angles.copy: Scotland's very own Lewis Capaldi is set to dominate Hyde Park next weekend. It's going to be emotional! #ScottishMusic

moments.title: Sam Fender & Olivia Dean Hold UK #1
moments.blurb: Sam Fender & Olivia Dean's 'Rein Me In' secures its 15th week at the top of the UK Official Singles Chart for the week of July 2nd - July 8th, 2026.

angles.name: Chart Topper
angles.copy: Still reigning supreme! Sam Fender & Olivia Dean hold the UK #1 spot for an incredible 15th week with 'Rein Me In'. What a track! #OfficialCharts

angles.name: Record Breaker
angles.copy: Fifteen weeks at number one! Sam Fender & Olivia Dean are making history with 'Rein Me In'. Is it one of the greatest chart runs ever?

angles.name: New Music vs Old
angles.copy: While 'Rein Me In' holds strong, Olivia Rodrigo and Harry Styles are also in the top 5! What's currently on your playlist?

moments.title: Happy 76th Birthday, Huey Lewis!
moments.blurb: American singer-songwriter and frontman of Huey Lewis and the News, Huey Lewis, celebrates his 76th birthday today, July 5th.

angles.name: Birthday Shoutout
angles.copy: Happy 76th Birthday to the legendary Huey Lewis! 'The Power of Love' and so many more hits. What's your favourite Huey Lewis & The News song? #HueyLewis

angles.name: 80s Icon
angles.copy: Still got that Heart of Rock & Roll! Wishing a very happy 76th birthday to Huey Lewis, a true icon of the 80s. #HappyBirthdayHueyLewis

angles.name: Music Memories
angles.copy: From 'Back to the Future' to 'Sports', Huey Lewis gave us some unforgettable tunes. Celebrating his 76th birthday today!

moments.title: Ringo Starr's 86th Birthday
moments.blurb: The legendary Beatles drummer, Ringo Starr, will celebrate his 86th birthday on July 7th, marked by his annual 'Peace & Love' celebration.

angles.name: Beatles Legend Birthday
angles.copy: Get ready to share some Peace & Love! Ringo Starr turns 86 on Tuesday, continuing his tradition of celebrating with fans worldwide. #RingoStarr

angles.name: Iconic Drummer
angles.copy: He's still got it! Wishing an early happy 86th birthday to The Beatles' Ringo Starr. What's your favourite Ringo moment?

angles.name: Global Celebration
angles.copy: Join the global 'Peace & Love' celebration for Ringo Starr's 86th birthday this Tuesday! A true music legend. #MusicIcon

moments.title: Courtney Love Turns 62
moments.blurb: Alternative rock icon Courtney Love, known for her work with Hole and her distinctive style, celebrates her 62nd birthday on July 9th.

angles.name: Grunge Queen Birthday
angles.copy: Happy 62nd Birthday to the one and only Courtney Love on Thursday! A true force in alternative rock. What's your favourite Hole track? #CourtneyLove

angles.name: 90s Icon
angles.copy: Celebrating a rock legend! Courtney Love turns 62 this week. Her influence on music and culture is undeniable. #90sMusic

angles.name: Unforgettable Style
angles.copy: Courtney Love: musician, actress, and an icon of unapologetic style. Wishing her a very happy 62nd birthday on July 9th!
